visual_analysis: The layout is clean and organized, with a clear hierarchy in text elements. The color scheme is simple yet effective, enhancing readability. The overall design has a professional appearance, contributing to a positive user experience.
educational_analysis: The application clearly states the purpose of the Exponential Search method and prompts users to engage with a sorted array and target value. Instructional elements are present, aiding in understanding the educational concept. The potential for hands-on learning through interaction further enhances its educational value.
